name: Hunter
description: Hunters specialize in combating monsters using adaptable tactics chosen to counter specific threats.

3.name: Hunter's Prey
3.description: You choose a combat tactic such as Colossus Slayer, Giant Killer, or Horde Breaker.

options.name: Colossus Slayer
options.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with a weapon attack, the creature takes an extra 1d8 damage if it is below its hit point maximum.

options.name: Giant Killer
options.description: When a Large or larger creature within 5 feet of you hits or misses you with an attack, you can use your reaction to make one weapon attack against that creature.

options.name: Horde Breaker
options.description: Once on each of your turns when you make a weapon attack, you can make another attack with the same weapon against a different creature within 5 feet of the original target and within range of your weapon.

7.name: Defensive Tactics
7.description: You gain a defensive feature such as Escape the Horde or Multiattack Defense.

options.name: Escape the Horde
options.description: Opportunity attacks against you are made with disadvantage.

options.name: Multiattack Defense
options.description: When a creature hits you with an attack, you gain a +4 bonus to AC against all subsequent attacks made by that creature for the rest of the turn.

options.name: Steel Will
options.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

11.name: Multiattack
11.description: You gain Volley or Whirlwind Attack.

options.name: Volley
options.description: You can use your action to make a ranged attack against any number of creatures within 10 feet of a point you can see within your weapon's range.

options.name: Whirlwind Attack
options.description: You can use your action to make a melee attack against any number of creatures within 5 feet of you, with a separate attack roll for each target.

15.name: Superior Hunter's Defense
15.description: You gain a powerful defensive reaction or resistance.

options.name: Evasion
options.description: When you are subjected to an effect that allows a Dexterity saving throw for half damage, you instead take no damage on a success and only half damage on a failure.

options.name: Stand Against the Tide
options.description: When a hostile creature misses you with a melee attack, you can use your reaction to force that creature to repeat the same attack against another creature (other than itself) of your choice.

options.name: Uncanny Dodge
options.description: When an attacker that you can see hits you with an attack, you can use your reaction to halve the attack's damage against you.
